name: praxis
description: An on-demand team of SDLC experts for Claude Code — the core six (business analyst, product owner, software architect, developer, QA, DevOps) plus specialists for security, frontend, data, ML/AI, and UX — with lifecycle orchestrators (/new-feature, /fix-bug, /refine), a gating Validation Orchestrator, a versioned memory ledger, and a skill factory (/learn, /validate-skills) to capture team conventions as skills. Use to consult one expert, run a feature end to end, or codify how your team works.
